title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
